articles.title: CBDCs Will Enable the Government To Seize Your Money, Says Ex-US Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy
articles.description: Former Republican presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy says greenlighting a central bank digital currency (CBDC) in the US will have repercussions on the citizens’ financial freedom. In a new interview with Bloomberg Television, Ramaswamy says the government may use the digital dollar to go after those who oppose them. “A central bank digital currency, I believe, […]
